DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative locked closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Lock the inoperative jettison isolation valve closed (AMM DDG 28-31-02).

ListItem.Para: For the left jettison isolation valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
For the right jettison isolation valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
Open and deactivate the main landing gear doors.
Gain access to the inoperative jettison isolation valve in the main gear wheel well.
Disconnect, cap and stow the valve electrical connector.
Close the main landing gear doors.
Both jettison isolation valves are locked closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the jettison system and lock both jettison isolation valves closed (AMM DDG 28-31-02).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the fuel jettison system by using a flight deck multi-function display only, opening the following circuit breakers and locking with INOP tags:
Lock the jettison isolation valves closed.
Open and deactivate the main landing gear doors.
Gain access to the jettison isolation valves in the main gear wheel well.
Disconnect, cap and stow the valve electrical connectors.
Close the main landing gear doors.

Note.Para: The Fuel Synoptic will incorrectly indicate jettison flow from the center tank when the center tank override pumps are on with fuel in the center tank. The overhead panel L and R fuel jettison nozzle VALVE lights will be illuminated.

OperationProcedure.Para: Limit the takeoff weight to the maximum climb limited landing weight at the departure airport plus 2600 lb (1179 kg).
